'''tatumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smacking|smacking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smacking|smacking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tatumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tætimith|tætimith]] || [[word:tætimij|tætimij]] || [[word:tætimish|tætimish]] || [[word:tætimi|tætimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tatutumuth|tatutumuth]] || [[word:tatutumuj|tatutumuj]] || [[word:tatutumush|tatutumush]] || [[word:tatutumu|tatutumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tatumuth|tatumuth]] || [[word:tatumuj|tatumuj]] || [[word:tatumush|tatumush]] || [[word:tatumu|tatumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tatufmuth|tatufmuth]] || [[word:tatufmuj|tatufmuj]] || [[word:tatufmush|tatufmush]] || [[word:tatufmuf|tatufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tatumuthu|tatumuthu]] || [[word:tatumuju|tatumuju]] || [[word:tatumushu|tatumushu]] || [[word:tatumuku|tatumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tatumuth|tatumuth]] || [[word:tatumuj|tatumuj]] || [[word:tatumush|tatumush]] || [[word:tatumu|tatumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tatumuthul|tatumuthul]] || [[word:tatumujul|tatumujul]] || [[word:tatumushul|tatumushul]] || [[word:tatumukul|tatumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tatumuthuthu|tatumuthuthu]] || [[word:tatumujuju|tatumujuju]] || [[word:tatumushushu|tatumushushu]] || [[word:tatumuku|tatumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tatumuthun|tatumuthun]] || [[word:tatumujun|tatumujun]] || [[word:tatumushun|tatumushun]] || [[word:tatumukun|tatumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tatumuthuoro|tatumuthuoro]] || [[word:tatumujuoro|tatumujuoro]] || [[word:tatumushuoro|tatumushuoro]] || [[word:tatumukuoro|tatumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
